title: 🔱 CORVUS STAR SESSION HANDSHAKE
text:
AGENTS.qmd Refactor: Reorganized the supreme directive into a structured “If-Then” matrix.
PennyOne Integration: Anchored all agent navigation to the Hall of Records (.stats/).
Terminal State Registry: Initialized .agent/state/terminal.json to provide persistent shell context.
Phase Handshaking: Upgraded the SovereignForge to record every phase transition in walkthrough.qmd.





Submodule Purification: Unified skills_db/ by removing nested .git folders and resolving “stuck” submodule errors.
Docker Sanctuary: Built the sentinel-sandbox image to enable containerized skill building.
Hyper-Surgical Forge: Reinstalled agent-lightning using a sterile, containerized ritual that isolates the skill from the Midgard host.
Muninn Upgrades: Fixed Python 3.10 type-hint incompatibilities and implemented surgical mirroring to bypass WSL2 I/O bottlenecks.





Sovereign Discovery: Upgraded sv_engine.py to proactively scan the global database for missing skills and auto-install them.
Interpretation Trace: Implemented mandatory response tracing for Atomic GPT Learning.
Signet Exile: Purged committed auth tokens and fortified .gitignore.
